items.description: Crash on I-99 northbound between .7 miles south of Exit 23: PA 36/PA 164/US 22 EAST - ROARING SPRING and .1 miles south of Exit 28: US 22 - EBENSBURG/HOLLIDAYSBURG. There is a lane restriction.
